summary: Comprehensive testing of P1/P2 Two-Stage AI for Extra Works. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All two-stage UI features verified working correctly including merge protection.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast correctly returns stage='fast' with instant rule-based proposals
POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine correctly returns stage='refined' with LLM hybrid proposals
ai-fast completes in <0.5s (instant), ai-refine takes ~15-30s per line (LLM call)
Both endpoints include hourly_info with worker_type, hourly_rate, min_hours, min_job_price
Both endpoints support batch processing with multiple lines
Frontend correctly calls ai-fast first, displays results, then calls ai-refine in background
Stage status badge transitions: 'Бърз анализ' → 'LLM уточняване...' (pulsing) → 'LLM уточнено' (green)
Per-line 'Бърз' badge shows on fast results for each line
'Приеми LLM подобрения (N)' button appears after refinement with count of pending deltas
Per-line 'Приеми LLM' link available for selective apply of individual line refinements
MERGE PROTECTION VERIFIED: User-edited fields (material_price tested) are NOT overwritten by refinement
UI remains interactive during LLM refinement (non-blocking async call)
Worker type badge shows correctly: шпакловчик 20лв/ч, бояджия 18лв/ч, плочкаджия 25лв/ч, майстор 22лв/ч
seed_data_creation: Used existing project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da). No test data was persisted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-stage AI endpoints tested: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast (rule-based, ~0.2s) and POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine (LLM hybrid, ~15-30s per line). Frontend data-testid values: extra-work-modal, ew-title-{n}, batch-ai-btn, result-line-{n}, apply-all-refine-btn, apply-refine-{n}. Stage badges: 'Бърз анализ', 'LLM уточняване...', 'LLM уточнено', 'LLM недостъпен'. Per-line badges: 'Бърз', 'LLM'. Merge protection tracks user edits via userEditedFields state. RefineDelta stores pending LLM suggestions.
